scripts.clean: rm -rf generated/typescript generated/golang generated/rust && mkdir -p generated/typescript generated/golang generated/rust
scripts.generate: npm run clean && npm run generate:typescript && npm run generate:golang && npm run generate:rust
scripts.generate:typescript: modelina generate typescript asyncapi.yaml -o generated/typescript --tsModelType interface --tsEnumType union --tsExportType named --tsModuleSystem ESM --tsIncludeComments --tsRawPropertyNames && node ./scripts/postprocess-typescript.mjs
scripts.generate:golang: modelina generate golang asyncapi.yaml -o generated/golang --packageName wscontract --goIncludeComments --goIncludeTags
